title: How SF Made Me Find My Style
description: How San Francisco's lack of fashion culture became a forcing function for authentic self-expression and identity.

title: Lessons I've Learned As a Young, Startup Founder
description: Reflections on founding two startups before age 22 — on age, passion, pivoting, hard work, and learning from failure.

title: Why isn't AI the buzzword that it used to be?
description: Exploring why AI has shifted from being the ultimate buzzword to a more pragmatic tool in the tech industry.
